comment.body:
Question for you all. What are some of your tips to not overtrade? ​I have recently been trying to use these two pscyhological questions to eliminate overtrading:
1) Would you bet your entire net worth on this trade? If "No", skip it. If "Yes", go to the next question. 
2) Would you be willing to make this trade in front of family and friends and exit at the target? If "No", skip it. If "Yes", make the trade. 
Any other tips you guys have? By the way, for me, over-trading is like 3 or 4 trades in a day. I would like to get it down to 1 at maximum.
